name: label-studio-mcp
description: Interact with a Label Studio instance: manage projects, tasks, annotations, predictions, users, workspaces, webhooks and ML backends.
long_description:
A Model Context Protocol server for [Label Studio](https://labelstud.io/). It exposes the full Label Studio REST API as tools so you can create and configure projects, import and label tasks, manage annotations and predictions, run Data Manager bulk actions, and administer users, workspaces, webhooks and ML backends — all from your MCP client.

This is a fork of the original [HumanSignal/label-studio-mcp-server](https://github.com/HumanSignal/label-studio-mcp-server), extended and maintained by DL-Solution with full REST API coverage, HTTP transport, desktop-bundle packaging and internal-CA / TLS support.

label_studio_url.title: Label Studio URL
label_studio_url.description: Base URL of your Label Studio instance (e.g. http://localhost:8080 or https://ls.internal.example).

label_studio_api_key.title: API Key
label_studio_api_key.description: Your Label Studio access token (Account & Settings → Access Token).

label_studio_ca_bundle.title: CA Certificate (optional)
label_studio_ca_bundle.description: PEM file of the internal/corporate CA that issued your Label Studio HTTPS certificate (e.g. an Active Directory CA). Leave empty for public certificates or plain HTTP.

label_studio_verify_ssl.title: Verify TLS certificate
label_studio_verify_ssl.description: Disable only for trusted internal networks with self-signed certificates. When off, HTTPS certificates are not verified.
